summary: Completed testing of iteration 5 cosmetic features: pagination, PDF vertical borders removal, and logo update. All 13 backend tests pass. All frontend pagination features verified working.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test orders (TEST_1, TEST_2 Pagination Test St) to have >10 orders for pagination testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified working. Key findings: 1) Pagination shows 10 orders per page with Prev/Next controls, 2) Orders sorted by created_at descending (latest first), 3) PDF has 0 vertical cell borders (verified with pdfplumber), 4) PDF has 18 horizontal lines for table separators, 5) PDF logo renders correctly on first page, 6) Logo file is valid PNG (24643 bytes), 7) All data-testid attributes present: order-list, pagination-controls, pagination-prev, pagination-next, order-row-{id}
